channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pavement litter and dead branches, 23rd July
item.description:
The pavement opposite my property and all the way up Old Rd next to park is literally strewn with litter, dead branches, some quite large and overgrown bramble.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shenstone Close, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass obstructing pavement, 23rd July
item.description:
Broken glass from a smashed windscreen has been here for l several weeks. Please remove as it is a safety hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Gubyon Avenue, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on the pavement, 23rd July
item.description:
Large amount of boxes and packaging has been dumped on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken car parts in the road and side parts of the road, 23rd July
item.description:
Broken car parts in the road and side parts of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Cross Route, Hackney Wick, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste bin full of debris, 23rd July
item.description:
A man was seen stealing the garden waste bin from outside no 28. He took the bin to the rear alleyway at the back of some properties then left it on the pavemnt next to no 27 and has filled the bin with debris and left it on the pavement since May. The stolen bin was replaced by bromley council after being reported stolen.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Sandpiper Way, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubble and carpet, 23rd July
item.description:
Dump in the forest behind Links medical Practice. Plead put up more signs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castleton Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins attracting vermin & flies, 23rd July
item.description:
Rubbish left around estate by vestry road 90-112 (even numbers) next to Nisa. Needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 23rd July
item.description:
Been here for a few days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Caulfield Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mini sink hole, 23rd July
item.description:
Sink joke of 4 inch diameter Is hollow beneath the edges so it will grow. Is about 4 inches deep too. Best repaired before someone breaks their neck tripping on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked cars, 23rd July
item.description:
For approximately three years, two vehicles associated with foreign businesses on this road have been parked repeatedly and persistently on the double yellow lines at the front of the road, often for long periods. This occurs dozens of times a day, every day. In that entire time, I have personally observed these vehicles receiving only two parking tickets, despite the constant and obvious breaches of the double yellow line restrictions.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancaster Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Can the items be removed please. The area is still being used a meeting and drinking place and toilet. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Staffordshire Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Microwave dumped outside 65 Walford Road, 23rd July
item.description:
A microwave and some polystyrene packaging has been dumped outside my house. This is part of a wider pattern of fly tipping on my street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poo bags left on the floors x3 outside 25 and 29 Macaulay Road , glass bottles and leaves everywhere - hazards ., 23rd July
item.description:
Outside 25&29 Macaulay Road there are 3 dog poo bags dumped on the floor , glass bottles , loads of leaves on the road and pavements , so many hazards , soft toys , dressing gown , a teepee dumped . Cans on the floor , it’s disgusting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Macaulay Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped, 23rd July
item.description:
Rubbish bags dumped by the salt container box on southover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southover, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags over flowing on street., 23rd July
item.description:
Previously reported and confirmed as closed but it’s all still here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected rubbish, spilling onto the street, 23rd July
item.description:
Food waste - that smells incredibly foul - spilling onto the street. Wasn’t sure whether to tell the residents OR just report it. So please can this be dealt with.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping waste, 23rd July
item.description:
The gentleman in the image lives opposite our block of flats, he is dumping general rubbish at the bottom of the block

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210-296, Rye Hill Park, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish piling up - people adding to rubbish, 23rd July
item.description:
Boxes, black bin bags…

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 23rd July
item.description:
Multiple open black bags of rubbish and clothes have been sitting there for weeks along with smashed glass bottles on the pavement. Needs cleaning up immediately.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wincrofts Drive, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected rubbish all over the road, 23rd July
item.description:
Rubbish all up Wickham lane. Residents near the Plumstead highstreet area didn’t put their rubbish in the bins on collection day and as a result it wasn’t collected by bin men and remains on the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
